heading: Domiciliary care programs
label: 2043 Domiciliary care programs
notes: References in TextThe date of the enactment of this section, referred to in subsec. (a), is the date of enactment of , which was approved .Pub. L. 107–95Dec. 21, 2001

Amendments2008—Subsec. (b). amended subsec. (b) generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary $5,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2003 and 2004 to establish the programs referred to in subsection (a).”Pub. L. 110–387
amendments: Amendments2008—Subsec. (b). amended subsec. (b) generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary $5,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2003 and 2004 to establish the programs referred to in subsection (a).”Pub. L. 110–387

children.heading: .—Authority
children.label: a .—Authority
children.text: The Secretary may establish up to 10 programs under (in addition to any program that is established as of the date of the enactment of this section) to provide domiciliary services under such section to homeless veterans.section 1710(b) of this title

children.heading: .—Enhancement of Capacity of Domiciliary Care Programs for Female Veterans
children.label: b .—Enhancement of Capacity of Domiciliary Care Programs for Female Veterans
children.text: The Secretary shall take appropriate actions to ensure that the domiciliary care programs of the Department are adequate, with respect to capacity and with respect to safety, to meet the needs of veterans who are women.
